org.arakhne.tinyMAS.situatedEnvironment.body

Interface AgentBody<PB extends PerceptionBody,IT extends Influence>

  • All Superinterfaces:
    SituatedObject
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractAgentBody, AnimalBody
    Deprecated. 
    See "http://www.janus-project.org"

    @Deprecated
public interface AgentBody<PB extends PerceptionBody,IT extends Influence>
extends SituatedObject
    Agent body.
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND <galland@arakhne.org>

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      AgentIdentifier getAgent()
      Deprecated. 
      Replies the identifier of the agent that owns this body.

      Deprecated. 
      Replies the probe of the agent that owns this body.
      PB getPerceptionBody()
      Deprecated. 
      Replies the perception characteristics of thi body.
      boolean influence(IT... influences)
      Deprecated. 
      Send an influence to the environment.
      boolean isFreezed()
      Deprecated. 
      Replies if this body was crashed.

    • Method Detail

      • getAgent

        AgentIdentifier getAgent()

        Replies the identifier of the agent that owns this body.

      • getAgentProbe

        Probe getAgentProbe()
        Deprecated.

      • getPerceptionBody

        PB getPerceptionBody()
        Deprecated. 
        Replies the perception characteristics of thi body.

      • isFreezed

        boolean isFreezed()
        Deprecated. 
        Replies if this body was crashed. A freezed body can not be moved.

      • influence

        boolean influence(IT... influences)
        Deprecated. 
        Send an influence to the environment.
